category_sources: Official homepage title identifies ShellCheck as a shell script analysis tool.
source_facts.description says ShellCheck is a static analysis and lint tool for shell scripts.
display_name_sources: Official homepage styles the project as ShellCheck.
docs_sources: Official shellcheck.net site provides the ShellCheck wiki documentation.
source_facts.repo identifies the official GitHub repository whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says static analysis and lint tool for (ba)sh scripts.
